message.content:
### 1) RENDERING  
The page renders correctly with no broken images, layout collapse, overlap, or obvious bugs. All UI elements (e.g., hero carousel, poster grids, tabs) are fully visible and aligned. No console-style errors are apparent.


### 2) VISIBLE ELEMENTS  
- **Hero Carousel**: Top banner with a 3-way gradient overlay, featuring a featured anime ("Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation Season 3") and "WATCH NOW" button.  
- **Navigation Bar**: Top menu with "Home," "Trending," "Schedule," "History," and user icons.  
- **Genre Rail**: Horizontal tabs ("All," "Action," "Adventure") with hover states.  
- **Section Headers**: "POPULAR THIS SEASON," "BROWSE" (with sub-tabs: "POPULAR," "TOP RATED," "NEWEST"), "TOP AIRING," "JUST FINISHED," "TOP MOVIES."  
- **Poster Grids**: Multiple grids (e.g., "POPULAR THIS SEASON," "BROWSE") with 2:3 ratio poster cards.  
- **Poster Cards**: Each card includes a poster, title, rating (e.g., "86"), format/year/eps (e.g., "TV | 2026 | 14 eps"), and a status dot.  
- **Action Buttons**: "WATCH NOW" (hero), "DETAILS" (hero), and hover play buttons on poster cards.  
- **Chips**: Genre tags (e.g., "Adventure," "Drama") with glassmorphism.  
- **Status Dots**: Colored dots (e.g., blue for "TV") on poster cards.  
- **Detail Pills**: Format/year/eps labels (e.g., "TV | 2026 | 14 eps") on poster cards.  
- **Top Airing/Just Finished/Top Movies Lists**: Vertical lists with poster, title, rating, and format/year.  


### 3) DESIGN MATCH to Miruro Goals  
- **Dark theme black background near #080808**: PASS (Background is a deep black, consistent with the goal).  
- **Lavender accent ~#b5a8ff instead of green**: PASS (Accent colors (e.g., "WATCH NOW" button, genre chips) use a lavender/purple hue, not green).  
- **Per-anime accent colors (different color per card/title)**: PARTIAL (Some cards use unique accent colors (e.g., "Mushoku Tensei" has a blue accent), but many use a consistent lavender/purple, so not fully per-anime).  
- **Hero carousel with banner image and 3-way gradient overlay**: PASS (Hero section includes a banner image with a gradient overlay and "WATCH NOW" button).  
- **Gradient text titles using a per-anime accent color**: FAIL (Title text (e.g., "Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation Season 3") is solid white, not gradient).  
- **Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur frosted) on chips and action buttons**: PASS (Genre chips and "WATCH NOW" button have a frosted, translucent background).  
- **Genre rail with masked/faded edges and per-genre hover colors**: PASS (Genre tabs have faded edges, and hover states use per-genre colors (e.g., "Action" tab turns lavender)).  
- **Poster cards in ~2:3 ratio with hover darken + play button, status dot, detail pills**: PASS (Cards are 2:3 ratio, with hover darken, play button, status dot, and detail pills).  
- **Real AniList catalog data (recognizable real anime titles)**: PASS (Titles include "Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation Season 3," "Attack on Titan," "Demon Slayer," "Jujutsu Kaisen," "One Piece," "Naruto," "My Hero Academia," "Death Note," "Hunter x Hunter," "One-Punch Man," "Tokyo Ghoul," "Sword Art Online," "Your Name.," "A Silent Voice," "The Promised Neverland," "Assassination Classroom," "Mob Psycho 100," "Chainsaw Man," "Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World-," "Your Lie in April," "ERASED," "Steins;Gate," "Haikyuu!!," "ONE PIECE HEROINES," "NIKKE Outpost: Off-Duty Tales," "Kai Pai Lai! Guaihou Da Dianying," "The Ramparts of Ice," "Eren the Southpaw," "Reborn as a Cat," "MARRIAGETOXIN," "I Want to End this Love Game," "Even a Replica Can Fall in Love," "NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE," "Your Name.," "A Silent Voice," "Demon Slayer -Kimetsu no Yaiba- The Movie: Mugen Train," "Spirited Away," "JUJUTSU KAISEN 0," "I Want to Eat Your Pancreas," "Howl's Moving Castle," "Weathering With You," "Princess Mononoke," "My Neighbor Totoro").  


### 4) VISUAL ISSUES  
- **Contrast**: Some text (e.g., "2026" in detail pills) has low contrast against the dark background, making it hard to read.  
- **Typography**: Font sizes vary inconsistently (e.g., section headers are larger, but some card titles are smaller, creating hierarchy issues).  
- **Alignment**: Poster cards in the "BROWSE" grid are slightly misaligned (e.g., "Attack on Titan" card is shifted left vs. adjacent cards).  
- **Color**: The "WATCH NOW" button’s lavender accent is too bright, clashing with the dark theme.  
- **Accessibility**: No visible alt text for images, and some text (e.g., "14 eps") is too small for low-vision users.  


### 5) OVERALL VERDICT  
The redesign successfully implements most Miruro design goals (dark theme, lavender accents, glassmorphism) but falls short on gradient titles and per-anime color consistency. Visual issues like low contrast and inconsistent typography reduce usability, but the layout is functional and recognizable as an anime streaming app.
